# Feature: Overlay UI polish (chips, icons, drag, collapse)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-10 -->

## Intent
Cursor-style context composer with element chips, crosshair picker icon, reload+fist icon, hover tooltips on toolbar buttons, draggable overlay, and collapse control.

## Preconditions
- Embedded or window overlay mode active
- Inspector enabled with selections

## Happy Path
- [x] Picker icon shows crosshair cursor; reload shows reload+fist combo
- [x] Selected elements appear as chips above issue textarea
- [x] Chip hover shows ELEMENT, PATH, ATTRIBUTES, COMPUTED STYLES
- [x] Toolbar buttons show German tooltip on hover
- [x] Overlay draggable via top header; collapse hides body, expand restores

## Regression
- [x] Picker toggle, copy, clear, screenshot still work
- [x] `npm run checks` passes

## Implementation Notes
- Guest embedded toolbar: `packages/guest/src/toolbar.ts` + helpers `toolbar-ui.ts`, `toolbar-icons.ts`, `toolbar-types.ts`
- Inspector window mode: `packages/inspector-app/src/components/{OverlayShell,ElementChip,Tooltip,FloatingToolbar,ContextPanel}.tsx`
- SDK React overlay: `packages/sdk/src/overlay/*` (parity with inspector-app)
- Chips use `elementChipLabel()` + hover popover with ELEMENT/PATH/ATTRIBUTES/COMPUTED STYLES
- Drag via header grip; collapse hides body, keeps header visible
- Rebuild: `npm run build:guest` and `npm run build:inspector`
